steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: Fireflies have “a special series of repeated flashes and pauses” that allow them to find each other. The blank must name this repeating, distinctive sequence of signals.

steps.title: Select the word that matches
steps.content:
Patterns directly captures this—a repeating, recognizable arrangement of signals.

The other three choices either misidentify what's needed (quantities focuses on amount, not sequence; decorations suggests ornament rather than function) or contradict the context (agreements implies conscious negotiation, not biological signaling).

That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
